description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a combination of metallic and wooden elements, giving it a futuristic yet rugged appearance. The upper receiver is adorned with a series of blue illuminated fins or vents, suggesting an energy-based or advanced cooling system. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with a cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath and a prominent trigger guard. The stock is made of wood, providing a classic touch, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. Various mechanical details, such as bolts, screws, and cables, are visible along the sides, enhancing its technical complexity. The muzzle is fitted with a device that appears to function as a compensator or muzzle brake, and the sighting system is integrated into the top rail.
description: A futuristic rifle with a mix of metal and wood, featuring blue illuminated fins, a drum magazine, and a detailed muzzle device. The design blends advanced technology with classic firearm elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device, blue illuminated fins, and the cylindrical drum magazine beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, blue vented upper receiver, wooden stock, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock, grip, and the alignment of the upper receiver and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with additional visibility of the mechanical details and cables.
